mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.dept_code = d.dept_code WHERE e.emp_del_status = 0
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 800000 AND 899999
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 900000 AND 999999
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 0 AND 9999
AND ( TO_CHAR(e.emp_no) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR CASE e.emp_grade WHEN 1 THEN '대표' WHEN 2 THEN '이사' WHEN 3 THEN '부장' WHEN 4 THEN '차장' WHEN 5 THEN '과장' WHEN 6 THEN '대리' WHEN 7 THEN '주임' WHEN 8 THEN '사원/비서' ELSE TO_CHAR(e.emp_grade) END LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT e.*, d.dept_name FROM emp e LEFT JOIN dept d ON e.dept_code = d.dept_code WHERE e.emp_del_status = 0
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 800000 AND 899999
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 900000 AND 999999
AND e.emp_no BETWEEN 0 AND 9999
AND ( TO_CHAR(e.emp_no) LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR d.dept_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR CASE e.emp_grade WHEN 1 THEN '대표' WHEN 2 THEN '이사' WHEN 3 THEN '부장' WHEN 4 THEN '차장' WHEN 5 THEN '과장' WHEN 6 THEN '대리' WHEN 7 THEN '주임' WHEN 8 THEN '사원/비서' ELSE TO_CHAR(e.emp_grade) END LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY e.emp_no DESC ) a WHERE rownum <= #{end} ) WHERE rn >= #{start}
SELECT * FROM emp WHERE emp_no = #{empNo} AND emp_del_status = 0
SELECT * FROM emp WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND emp_del_status = 0
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emp ( emp_no, emp_name, emp_id, emp_password, emp_tel, emp_grade, emp_sal, emp_email, emp_pic, user_access, dept_code, emp_join_date, emp_del_status, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{emp_no}, #{emp_name}, #{emp_id}, #{emp_password}, #{emp_tel}, #{emp_grade}, #{emp_sal, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{emp_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emp_pic, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{user_access}, #{dept_code}, SYSDATE, 0, #{reg_emp_no}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE emp SET emp_name = #{emp_name}, emp_tel = #{emp_tel}, emp_grade = #{emp_grade}, emp_sal = #{emp_sal, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, emp_email = #{emp_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_code = #{dept_code}, emp_del_status = #{emp_del_status}, emp_pic = #{emp_pic, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE emp_no = #{emp_no}
